product.name: Filon V Flow GRP Dry Fix Valley Trough Eaves Closure
product.description: Manufactured from Glass Reinforced Polyester (GRP), this V Flow GRP Dry Fix Valley Trough Eaves Closure from Filon comes with two polyethylene packers and a 500mm x 450mm GRP support strip. Filon created the first GRP valley gutters for the UK market in the 1980s and has been producing GRP products for over 50 years.This eaves closure is part of the V-Flow Dry Fix (DF) valley trough range, which caters for slate and tile roof materials. It is suitable for use with a valley trough and is part of a dry-fix system designed to eradicate the issues associated with using cement mortar. With grey finishes to imitate the appearance of lead and matt black flexible closures, the Filon V-Flow DF valley trough range has a minimum life expectancy of 20 years.Features & Benefits: Filon V Flow GRP Dry Fix Valley Trough Eaves ClosureEliminates issues associated with using cement mortarMade from GRP materialRange of heights availableFully recyclable at the end of lifeIncludes two polyethylene packers and a 500mm x 450mm GRP support stripPlease note: This product is only compatible with other products from the same manufacturer.

product.name: Wrekin SX GRID 4m x 50m Biaxial Geogrid
product.description:
WREKIN SX GRID Biaxial geogrids can solve pavement problems by providing omni-axial reinforcement to granular sub-bases, capping layers & railway ballasts in areas of weak or variable soils. When granular particles are compacted over these grids, they partially penetrate and project through the apertures to create a strong and positive interlock. The load dispersal effect from the interlocking mechanism increases shearing resistance within the soil, improving compaction and allowing the sub base thickness to be decreased, ultimately reducing construction time and costs.
Applications for WREKIN SX GRID

Construction haul roads
Paved and unpaved roads
Railways and ports
Working platforms on weak sub-soils
Parking and paved areas
Multi-layer applications

product.name: Wrekin Double Sealed Galvanised Steel Access Manhole Cover and Frame -  2.5 Tonne
product.description: Without any sharp edges to avoid damage, Wrekin's double-sealed steel access manhole cover sits inside the steel frame. This access cover works well with applications where Gross Laden Vehicle Weights (GLVW) will not exceed 2.5 tonnes, making it perfect for infrequent or slow-moving traffic.A cost-effective solution for pedestrian areas, including footpaths, cycle tracks and changing room facilities, this cover incorporates a reliable surface seal that limits water ingress and stops the rise of any foul odours. Thanks to its Labyrinth surface pattern, water cannot gather and pool, keeping pedestrians from slipping.Features & Benefits: Wrekin Double Sealed Galvanised Steel Access Manhole Cover and Frame -  2.5 TonneIdeal for pedestrian locations (footpaths, cycle tracks and changing room facilities)No sharp edges to limit the risk of damageSurface seal prevents water ingress and escaping odoursLabyrinth surface pattern keeps water from pooling to lessen pedestrian slipsDouble-seal achieved by captive O-ring gasket under lateral compressionSeal heightens levels of resistance to gaseous and/or liquid ingress and/or egress under normal atmospheric pressureThe double-seal formed by the clever captive O-ring gasket under lateral compression is in a specially designed lipped channel, advanced by the cover's continuous surface at the corners. Thanks to the extra neoprene gasket vertically compressed in a channel, a second seal is obtained for a higher level of resistance to gaseous and/or liquid ingress and/or egress under normal atmospheric pressure.Standards & CertificationGalvanised to BS EN ISO 1461Cover and frame is FACTA class A

product.name: Wrekin Galvanised Steel Double Sealed Recessed Manhole Cover and Frame - 2.5 Tonne
product.description: Designed to tolerate a Gross Laden Vehicle Weight (GLVW) of up to 10 tonnes, Wrekin's recessed double seal manhole cover has an unobtrusive appearance. With a neoprene rubber double-seal and four screw locking, it is ideal for light to medium-duty applications and is FACTA AAA rated, withstanding 2.5-tonne pneumatic SMWL loads.The cover and the frame are made from mild steel, galvanised for additional durability. This product is the perfect choice for indoor use as it can be filled with tiles and other internal floor surfaces, alongside a screed or concrete infill.Features & Benefits: Wrekin Galvanised Steel Double Sealed Recessed Manhole Cover and Frame - 2.5 TonneMade from durable galvanised mild steelTolerates a Gross Laden Vehicle Weight (GLVW) of up to 10 tonnesWithstands 2.5-tonne pneumatic SMWL loadsIdeal for light to medium-duty applicationsSuits indoor useCan be filled with tiles and other internal floor surfaces, alongside a screed or concrete infill38mm tray depthThe recess of the tray has a 40mm nominal depth. Weight-loading capabilities are provided with the belief that the recess will be correctly filled with screed or concrete to the appropriate level.Standards & CertificationFACTA Class: AAAGalvanised mild steel to BS EN ISO 1461

product.name: Wrekin Galvanised Steel Double Sealed Access Manhole Cover & Frame - 5 Tonne
product.description: With a double seal for improved levels of resistance to gaseous and/or liquid ingress and/or egress under normal atmospheric pressure, this pressed steel access cover and frame by Wrekin is used in areas where Gross Laden Vehicle Weight (GLVW) will not exceed 5 tonnes. It is free of sharp edges and accompanied by a reliable surface seal that eliminates water ingress and prevents odours that can otherwise escape the cover in the long term. When coupled with the labyrinth surface pattern, this manhole cover and frame can also limit water pooling to enhance safety, erasing the chance of slipping and tripping for pedestrians.Features & Benefits: Wrekin Galvanised Steel Double Sealed Access Manhole Cover & Frame - 5 TonneDouble-sealed for better resistance levels to gas and liquid ingress/egress under normal atmospheric pressureFit for use where Gross Laden Vehicle Weight won't exceed 5 tonnesFavoured in areas with slow-moving or infrequent trafficCost-effective for applications in domestic driveways or light industrial areasSurface seal prevents water ingress and odours escaping the coverLabyrinth surface pattern for the reduction of water pooling to prevent slips and tripsThe effective double seal is attained with the innovative captive O-ring gasket beneath the lateral compression, located in the specially designed lipped channel and enhanced by the continuous surface of the cover at the corners. product.description: Wrekin's recessed steel manhole cover is the perfect solution for ensuring the continuity of a view or pathway is not disrupted. product.description:
This Wrekin recessed manhole cover has a 100mm tray depth to accept block paving of 80mm. product.name: Wrekin Ductile Iron Manhole Cover and Frame 75mm - B125
product.description: Wrekin's B125 Class manhole cover is designed to tolerate 12.5-tonne test loads and is made of high-strength, durable and lightweight ductile iron to last for years. With its single-seal labyrinth arrangement, the cover helps prevent odours from escaping the drainage system and stops water ingress.This manhole cover complies with BS EN 124 1994 standards and comes with a Kitemark by BSI for quality reassurance*. product.name: Wrekin Highways Cast Iron Manhole Cover 100mm - D400
product.description: This Highways range Cast Iron Access Cover by Wrekin is a Group 4 D400 loading class manhole cover used in carriageway environments. A strong, durable cast iron material, the patented frame design has enlarged frame corners to ensure the load is dissipated. Its design also encompasses mechanical lifting points to make removal of the cover easier if needed and a three-point suspension for non-rock stability.The cover is also indexed to ensure correct fitting and is available with various internal dimensions. To assure you of its quality and safe and robust performance, this manhole cover also complies with BS EN 124 standard, is third-party certified by BSI and complies with UK Highways Authority specification HA 104/09. The patented safety keyway prevents accidental disengagement during lifting operations and can be used with standard D400 lifting keys.Features & Benefits: Wrekin Highways Cast Iron Manhole Cover 100mm - D400Suitable for Group 4 D400 loading class areas, withstands 40-tonne test loadsStrong and durable cast iron materialPatented enlarged frame corners to dissipate the load and mechanical lifting points for removal of cover in maintenance or replacementThree-point suspension for non-rock stabilityPatented safety keyway prevents accidental disengagement during lifting, compatible with standard D400 lifting keysPlease note: Locked, Badged 'SW'/'FW', Ventilation holes, Sealing plate, Safety grill, and Anti-slip coating (60+ PSRV) options are also available.

product.name: Wrekin Highways Cast Iron Manhole Cover 100mm - D400
product.description: This Highways range Cast Iron Access Cover by Wrekin is a Group 4 D400 loading class manhole cover used in carriageway environments. A strong, durable cast iron material, the patented frame design has enlarged frame corners to ensure the load is dissipated. Its design also encompasses mechanical lifting points to make removal of the cover easier if needed and a three-point suspension for non-rock stability.The cover is also indexed to ensure correct fitting and is available with various internal dimensions. To assure you of its quality and safe and robust performance, this manhole cover also complies with BS EN 124 standard, is third-party certified by BSI and complies with UK Highways Authority specification HA 104/09. The patented safety keyway prevents accidental disengagement during lifting operations and can be used with standard D400 lifting keys.Features & Benefits: Wrekin Highways Cast Iron Manhole Cover 100mm - D400Suitable for Group 4 D400 loading class areas, withstands 40-tonne test loadsStrong and durable cast iron materialPatented enlarged frame corners to dissipate the load and mechanical lifting points for removal of cover in maintenance or replacementThree-point suspension for non-rock stabilityPatented safety keyway prevents accidental disengagement during lifting, compatible with standard D400 lifting keysPlease note: Locked, Badged 'SW'/'FW', Ventilation holes, Sealing plate, Safety grill, and Anti-slip coating (60+ PSRV) options are also available.

product.name: Wrekin Galvanised Steel Single Recessed 80mm Block Paving Manhole Cover - 44 Tonnes
product.description: With a mild steel structure galvanised for increased strength and durability, this Single Recessed Manhole Cover from Wrekin has a 100mm tray depth to accept block paving of 80mm. It is for heavy-duty areas with a Gross Laden Vehicle Weight (GLVW) of 44 tonnes and a small moving wheel load for pneumatic tyres of up to 11 tonnes.Suitable for where a steel manhole cover disrupts or obstructs the continuity of flooring in commercial areas, service areas and industrial areas, this manhole cover permits a better design for outdoor areas, as well as a better continuation of the pattern or finish. It accepts bedding mortar much more reliably than plastic alternatives, enhancing stability.Features & Benefits: Wrekin Galvanised Steel Single Recessed 80mm Block Paving Manhole Cover - 44 TonnesMild steel structure galvanised for increased strength and durability100mm tray depth to accept block paving of 80mmIntended for heavy-duty areasGross Laden Vehicle Weight (GLVW) of 44 tonnes and a small moving wheel load for pneumatic tyres of up to 11 tonnesSuitable for where a steel manhole cover disrupts or obstructs the continuity of flooring in commercial areas, service areas and industrial areasCreates a better design for outdoor areas, and better continuation of the pattern or finishFor an improved lifespan of the recessed block paving manhole cover, lifting keyways are reinforced as standard to prevent distortion inflicted by lifting.Standards & CertificationFACTA D ratingGalvanised to BS EN ISO 1461

product.name: Wrekin Tri-Star Ductile Iron Manhole Cover 100mm - D400
product.description: This D400 Ductile Iron Access Manhole Cover from the Tristar range meets the rigorous standards of BS EN 124:1994 and comes with the British Standard Kitemark. Specially designed for Group 4 Class D400 carriageway use, it combines reliability with innovation.With a patented safety keyway, accidental disengagement during lifting is effectively prevented, complemented by seamless compatibility with standard D400 lifting keys for added convenience. With a three-point suspension system, this cover offers exceptional non-rock stability, ensuring your peace of mind. Constructed from strong and highly durable ductile iron, it is built to last. The patented frame design features enlarged corners that effectively dissipate the load, enhancing longevity and performance. product.name: Wrekin Highways Ductile Iron Manhole Cover 150mm - D400
product.description: Designed for Group 4 Class D400 carriageway environments, this Wrekin Highways Ductile Iron Manhole Cover includes a durable ductile iron structure, three-point suspension for non-rock stability and a patented frame with enlarged corners for a dissipated load.Indexed for accurate fitting, this cover also features mechanical lifting points for easy removal and a patented safety keyway to limit accidental disengagement when lifting. product.name: Wrekin Armadillo Iron Manhole Protection Shell Cover - 60 Tonne
product.description: Available in various sizes, this Armadillo Iron Manhole Protection Shell is a temporary manhole cover. It's an accessory for Highway and TriStar manhole covers, used during construction phases to prevent issues from occurring. Manufactured from ductile iron, this temporary cover can also withstand 60 tonnes and is a sacrificial shell that is 100% recyclable and reusable.Vertical anchors implemented in the design of this cover prevent lateral movement. It also has an anti-debris guard that stops unwanted waste from falling into the drain and a watertight seal to prevent water ingress.Features & Benefits: Wrekin Armadillo Iron Manhole Protection Shell Cover - 60 TonneAvailable in various sizesTemporary cover for Highway and TriStar manhole coversPrevents issues during construction phasesManufactured from ductile iron for durabilitySuitable for use with loads up to 60 tonnes (in conjunction with a D400 manhole cover)Sacrificial shell that is 100% recyclable and reusableVertical anchors prevent lateral movementAnti-debris guard stops waste from falling into the drainWatertight seal prevents water ingress

product.name: WREKIN BT Approved Concrete Infill Manhole Cover
product.description: With a sturdy 46mm frame depth and 43mm cover depth, this WREKIN BT Approved Concrete Infill Manhole Cover is available in a range of clear opening sizes to suit your needs. With an easy and efficient installation process, it comes ready-filled with concrete and can be set up by a single person, minimising labour costs. The tapered sides and centralised lifting points make removal effortless, allowing the cover to slide out of the frame. Delivering exceptional durability, it is hot-dipped galvanised for long-lasting performance and excellent corrosion resistance. Plus, it is BT-approved, meeting the standards required by telecommunications companies like Openreach and Virgin Media. With third-party certification from BSI, it ensures quality and reliability. product.name: WREKIN Clicklift Manhole Cover Frame Raising System - 600mm x 600mm
product.description: Offering a time-saving solution for a hassle-free manhole frame installation, this 600mm x 600mm WREKIN Clicklift Manhole Cover Frame Raising System eliminates the need for digging out and reinstalling manhole frames to match the final road surface, saving you time and resources. Without the potential to damage manhole covers during construction, this Clicklift system minimises disruption and avoids resident claims for vehicle damage. It is designed to provide housing developers and contractors with significant savings in time, money and effort. It is BSI Kitemarked, ensuring reliability and quality assurance. Features & Benefits: WREKIN Clicklift Manhole Cover Frame Raising System - 600mm x 600mm600mm x 600mm clear opening and available in various depthsSaves time and resources during installationEliminates need for digging and reinstalling framesMinimises potential damage to manhole coversReduces disruption and resident claimsProvides significant savings for developers and contractorsBSI Kitemarked for quality assurance Please note: *This means the installer will need to pay particular attention to the height and alignment of the frame on installation (taking into account any camber or gradient of the road and the level of the final surface layer).

product.name: WREKIN BT Approved Recessed Cover for Block Paving
product.description: With an 86mm frame depth, this WREKIN BT Approved Recessed Cover is designed specifically for Block Paving and is available in a range of clear opening sizes to suit various needs and applications. Ensuring exceptional durability, it complies with Wrekin loading code N and BS EN 124 Class B125.Trusted by telecommunications companies like Virgin Media and Openreach, this recessed cover holds BT approval for reliability and quality assurance. Its user-friendly design allows for effortless installation by a single person, resulting in labour cost savings. Featuring a slide-out cover with tapered sides and centralised lifting points, it facilitates easy removal for maintenance or access. Ensuring exceptional durability, it complies with Wrekin loading code N and BS EN 124 Class B125.Trusted by telecommunications companies like Virgin Media and Openreach, this recessed cover holds BT approval for reliability and quality assurance. Its user-friendly design allows for effortless installation by a single person, resulting in labour cost savings. Featuring a slide-out cover with tapered sides and centralised lifting points, it facilitates easy removal for maintenance or access. product.name: WREKIN Aluminium Recessed Domestic Light Duty Access Cover
product.description: This WREKIN Aluminium Recessed Domestic Light Duty Access Cover offers a sleek solution for indoor access needs. Made with a sturdy aluminium frame, this cover has a 27mm infill frame depth and 40mm overall frame depth. Its loading code L ensures reliable performance for light-duty domestic use, withstanding up to 1.25 tonnes of slow-moving wheel loads (pneumatic tyres) and up to 5 tonnes of gross-laden vehicle weight. Featuring four locking screws and three neoprene seals, this cover provides robust protection against gas egression and water and grit infiltration. You can choose from various clear opening sizes to suit your specific requirements. Perfect for indoor spaces that require a polished finish, it blends seamlessly into its surroundings. product.name: Ubbink OFT/1F Flat Roof Vent/Terminal
product.description: Suitable for soil and vent systems, Ubbink's OFT/1F Flat Roof Vent/Terminal is the perfect option for flat roof extraction. It is also usable for natural (passive) or mechanical ventilation installations. Ideal for a felt roof covering, providing a large free vent area with a low Pascal resistance figure. This vent/terminal is available with varying pipe diameters to allow termination through a flat roof to ducting. There are also varying flange types, five included, for different roof coverings such as Asphalt, Felt, EPDM, Bitumen and PVC. Additionally, the Ubbink OFT/1 has a stack cap to fix mechanically to ensure the system is more secure when installed in extreme weather. If needed, this part is removable for servicing purposes. Features & Benefits: Ubbink OFT/1F Flat Roof Vent/TerminalSuitable for soil and vent systems and ideal for flat roof extractionUsable for natural or mechanical ventilation installationsIdeal for felt roof coveringLarge free vent areaLow Pascal resistance figureAvailable with varying pipe diametersTermination through flat roof to ductingFive varying flange types availableStack cap for secure installation in extreme weatherRemovable for servicing purposesPlease note: Contact our sales team to discuss flange options.

product.name: WREKIN Pressed Steel Light Duty Access Cover
product.description: Ideal for safe and reliable access, this WREKIN Pressed Steel Light Duty Access Cover comes in various clear opening sizes and a slim 25mm depth. Its hot-dipped galvanised finish ensures longevity and exceptional corrosion resistance, promising years of dependable performance. Designed with keyway lifting points on the frame, this access cover ensures safe and secure handling during installation and maintenance. Plus, with its integrated lifting handle, it is easy to manoeuvre. Perfect for light to medium duty loading (code M+), it is a practical choice for a range of applications, withstanding up to 17.5 tonnes of gross-laden vehicle weight and 4.25 tonnes of slow-moving wheel load (pneumatic tyres). product.name: Ubiflex Black 3.5mm B3 Lead Alternative
product.description: This Ubiflex Black 3.5mm thick B3 Lead Alternative is a non-lead flashing material suitable for all applications where traditional lead is applied. It is manufactured with a modified polyethin compound and features an aluminium mesh reinforcement. As a result of its manufacturing, Ubiflex is environmentally friendly, non-toxic and recyclable, assisting in it being only of value to the installed as it has no re-sale value as scrap. Ubiflex is 80% lighter than lead to assist with handling, structural, health and safety advantages. It is also 50% quicker to install than lead, is entirely malleable, can be worked in both directions and is self-sealing if punctured. As a lead alternative, Ubiflex is also not susceptible to thermal movement, which allows aprons up to 12m long to be formed without seams or expansion joints, meaning there is less wastage than with traditional materials. For reassurance, Ubiflex B3 is also BBA Certified and approved by the NHBC (National House Building Council) and Zurich insurance.Features & Benefits: Ubiflex Black 3.5mm B3 Lead AlternativeBlack 3.5mm thickness B3 lead alternativeAvailable in 6m or 12m lengths and varying widthsNon-lead flashing material suitable for various applicationsManufactured with modified polyethin compound that is environmentally friendly, non-toxic, and recyclableFeatures aluminium mesh reinforcement80% lighter than lead for easy handling and 50% quicker installation than leadEntirely malleable, can be worked in both directionsSelf-sealing if puncturedNot susceptible to thermal movementAllows aprons up to 12m long without seams or jointsBBA Certified, NHBC and Zurich insurance approvedApplicationsStepped FlashingsAbutment FlashingsChimney FlashingsPitched Valley LiningRooflights and Solar PanelsDormersStandards & CertificationCertification: BBAPlease note: To ensure Ubiflex Lead Alternative Flashing is correctly applied, please use Ubiflex High Tack Sealant.
product.variant_name: Ubiflex B3 Lead Alternative Flashing 3.5mm x 250mm x 12m - Black

product.name: Ubiflex Grey 3.5mm B3 Lead Alternative
product.description: Manufactured from a modified polyethin compound with an aluminium mesh reinforcement, this Ubiflex flashing from Ubbink is an ideal alternative to lead. It can be used in all applications where lead is traditionally fitted, such as dormers, rooflights and solar panels, pitched valley lining, chimney flashings, abutment flashings and stepped flashings, making it an extremely versatile solution. Recyclable, non-toxic and environmentally friendly, Ubiflex has no re-sale value as scrap, so it’s less prone to theft.A remarkable 80% lighter and 50% quicker to fix than lead, Ubiflex ensures health and safety as well as structural and handling benefits. It’s completely malleable and self-sealing if punctured, and it can be worked in both directions. Unaffected by thermal movement, Ubiflex enables aprons up to 12m in length to be formed without expansion joints or seams, which means less wastage than with traditional materials.Features & Benefits: Ubiflex Grey 3.5mm B3 Lead AlternativeModified polyethin compound with aluminium mesh reinforcementIdeal alternative to leadRecyclable, non-toxic and environmentally friendlyNo re-sale value as scrapLighter and quicker to install than leadFully malleableSelf-sealing if puncturedNot susceptible to thermal movementCan be worked in both directionsStandards & CertificationUbiflex B3 is BBA certified as well as approved by Zurich Insurance and the NHBC (National House Building Council).Please note: To ensure Ubiflex Alternative Flashing is installed correctly, please use Ubiflex High Tack Sealant.

product.name: Ubiflex Grey 3.5mm B3 Lead Alternative
product.description: Manufactured from a modified polyethin compound with an aluminium mesh reinforcement, this Ubiflex flashing from Ubbink is an ideal alternative to lead. It can be used in all applications where lead is traditionally fitted, such as dormers, rooflights and solar panels, pitched valley lining, chimney flashings, abutment flashings and stepped flashings, making it an extremely versatile solution. Recyclable, non-toxic and environmentally friendly, Ubiflex has no re-sale value as scrap, so it’s less prone to theft.A remarkable 80% lighter and 50% quicker to fix than lead, Ubiflex ensures health and safety as well as structural and handling benefits. It’s completely malleable and self-sealing if punctured, and it can be worked in both directions. Unaffected by thermal movement, Ubiflex enables aprons up to 12m in length to be formed without expansion joints or seams, which means less wastage than with traditional materials.Features & Benefits: Ubiflex Grey 3.5mm B3 Lead AlternativeModified polyethin compound with aluminium mesh reinforcementIdeal alternative to leadRecyclable, non-toxic and environmentally friendlyNo re-sale value as scrapLighter and quicker to install than leadFully malleableSelf-sealing if puncturedNot susceptible to thermal movementCan be worked in both directionsStandards & CertificationUbiflex B3 is BBA certified as well as approved by Zurich Insurance and the NHBC (National House Building Council).Please note: To ensure Ubiflex Alternative Flashing is installed correctly, please use Ubiflex High Tack Sealant.

product.name: Manthorpe SlotDrain A15 Plastic Channel Drain - 1000mm
product.description: The Manthorpe SlotDrain A15 Plastic Channel Drain is a discreet and efficient solution for managing standing water in outdoor paved areas. With only a 20mm wide slot visible when installed, it seamlessly integrates into block paving up to 50mm depth and is also suitable for patios, driveways, paths, and areas requiring compliance with Part M building regulation thresholds. This channel drain is easy to install with lengths that slot together and can be cut down at specific intervals to suit your projects requirements. Its multiple rainwater exit points are compatible with standard 4-inch underground drainage pipes, ensuring efficient water removal.For a complete system, additional components like the SlotDrain Junction Unit and Accessory Pack are available. The Junction Unit provides essential access for rodding and cleaning, with options to create corners, T-junctions, or 4-way junctions at 3m intervals in longer runs. Designed for functionality and durability, the SlotDrain system offers a reliable and low-profile drainage solution for a wide range of applications.Features & Benefits: Manthorpe SlotDrain A15 Plastic Channel Drain - 1000mmDiscreet design with a 20mm visible slot, ideal for paved areas and drivewaysEasy installation with lengths that slot together and multiple cut pointsCompatible with standard 4-inch underground drainage pipes for efficient water management

Its multiple rainwater exit points are compatible with standard 4-inch underground drainage pipes, ensuring efficient water removal.For a complete system, additional components like the SlotDrain Junction Unit and Accessory Pack are available. The Junction Unit provides essential access for rodding and cleaning, with options to create corners, T-junctions, or 4-way junctions at 3m intervals in longer runs. Designed for functionality and durability, the SlotDrain system offers a reliable and low-profile drainage solution for a wide range of applications.Features & Benefits: Manthorpe SlotDrain A15 Plastic Channel Drain - 1000mmDiscreet design with a 20mm visible slot, ideal for paved areas and drivewaysEasy installation with lengths that slot together and multiple cut pointsCompatible with standard 4-inch underground drainage pipes for efficient water management

product.name: WREKIN Steel Block Paving Light Duty Access Cover Double Seal & 100mm Tray
product.description: This WREKIN Steel Block Paving Light Duty Access Cover with a Double Seal and 100mm Tray depth is available in a range of clear opening sizes to suit your access requirements. With a loading code M rating, this cover is ideal for light to medium duty loads, accommodating up to 10 tonnes of gross-laden vehicle weight and 2.5 tonnes of slow-moving wheel load (pneumatic tyres).Engineered for durability and longevity, this block paviour access cover is hot-dipped galvanised, delivering optimal performance and corrosion resistance throughout its lifespan. With keyway lifting points integrated into the frame, it ensures safe, secure and hassle-free handling. product.name: Wrekin Triple Sealed 60mm Aluminium Recessed Access Cover - 25 Tonnes
product.description:
The Wrekin 60mm Aluminium Triple Sealed Recessed Access Cover is a high-quality access solution designed for areas requiring a seamless, aesthetically pleasing finish. The cover features a 40mm tray depth and a 60mm frame depth, providing durability and strength, with a load capacity of 5 tonnes SMWL when filled.
This superior recessed access cover is equipped with four locking screws and three neoprene seals to provide additional protection against odour egress and water ingress, ensuring a clean and secure environment. Manufactured from strong, recyclable, and corrosion-resistant aluminium, this access cover is ideally suited for both indoor and external in areas.  All covers come with threaded keys for easy lifting through screw holes. Whether in residential, commercial, or industrial settings, the Wrekin Aluminium Triple Sealed Recessed Access Cover delivers both performance and visual appeal.
Features & Benefits: Wrekin Triple Sealed 60mm Aluminium Recessed Access Cover - 25 TonnesKeys included25 tonne GLVW (5 tonne SMWL)Durable, recyclable aluminium construction
Standards & CertificationFACTA Class: B

This superior recessed access cover is equipped with four locking screws and three neoprene seals to provide additional protection against odour egress and water ingress, ensuring a clean and secure environment. Manufactured from strong, recyclable, and corrosion-resistant aluminium, this access cover is ideally suited for both indoor and external in areas.  All covers come with threaded keys for easy lifting through screw holes. Whether in residential, commercial, or industrial settings, the Wrekin Aluminium Triple Sealed Recessed Access Cover delivers both performance and visual appeal.

product.name: Calder Lead Code 3 Roofing Lead Flashing Roll - 100mm
product.description: With a 100mm width and 1.32mm thickness and weighing 14.97kg/m², this Code 3 Roofing Lead Flashing Roll from Calder will protect your roof against water penetration and is ideal for use with lead soakers. Flexible, easily shaped and long-lasting while enduring all weather conditions, it is perfectly suited to the climate in the UK.Found on the roofs of many types of buildings across the United Kingdom, lead flashing is a material of choice for builders because of its durability, grey colour with a protective patina and, most notably, ease of use. Suitable for sealing gaps around doors and windows, it has been in use as a material for buildings for centuries, and due to being manufactured from continuously recyclable material, it is still as significant in today's sustainable society as it was when initially introduced. product.description: With a thickness of 3.55mm and a weight of 40.26kg/m², this 150mm Calder Code 8 Lead Flashing, available in lengths of 3m and 6m, is ideal for making robust, high-quality tapered gutters and parapets. However, Code 8 lead is often too thick and heavy for use in pitched roofing.What's more, Calder Code 8 Lead Flashing is very easy to shape and use, making it highly popular with professionals. product.name: Calder Lead Code 6 Roofing Lead Flashing Roll - 210mm
product.description: By Calder, this Roofing Lead Flashing is available in a roll, measuring 210mm wide by varying lengths. At 2.65mm thickness and weighing approx. 30.05/m², it adorns the roofs of churches, offices, factories, and public buildings. Specifically, this Code 6 lead can be used for flashings, flat roofing, parapet and tapered valley gutters, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, dormers, bay roofs and canopies. When it's time to dispose of this lead flashing, it can be salvaged repeatedly, as it is 100% recyclable as a natural metal material.The lead flashing is ideal for preventing rainwater from penetrating the property, with the addition of being easy to work with, has excellent shaping capabilities, is exceptionally durable, and features a distinctive grey patina. The patina is crucial, protecting your property from varying weather conditions, including heavy rain, where water is at risk of entering. Moreover, by adhering to good installation practices, your lead sheet can outperform other building materials-an assertion supported by a comprehensive 50-year warranty.Features & Benefits: Calder Lead Code 6 Roofing Lead Flashing Roll - 210mmCode 6 lead flashing suitable for flashings, flat roofing, parapet and tapered valley gutters, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, dormers, bay roofs and canopiesA natural metal that is 100% recyclable time after timeProtects against varying weather conditions with rain resistanceFlexible material that's easy to installHas a thermal Conductivity of 34.76W/m/°C and a melting point of 327.4°CDensity of 11.34g/cm³ and weighing approx. 30.05/m²Manufactured to BS EN 12588:2006 standardsDurable with a 50-year warrantyWith sustainability at its core since the mid-'90s, lead flashing has taken the UK by storm. product.name: Calder Lead Code 6 Roofing Lead Flashing Roll - 240mm
product.description: By Calder, this Roofing Lead Flashing is available in a roll, measuring 240mm wide by varying lengths. At 2.65mm thickness and weighing approx. 30.05/m², it adorns the roofs of churches, offices, factories, and public buildings. Specifically, this Code 6 lead can be used for flashings, flat roofing, parapet and tapered valley gutters, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, dormers, bay roofs and canopies. When it's time to dispose of this lead flashing, it can be salvaged repeatedly, as it is 100% recyclable as a natural metal material.The lead flashing is ideal for preventing rainwater from penetrating the property, with the addition of being easy to work with, has excellent shaping capabilities, is exceptionally durable, and features a distinctive grey patina. The patina is crucial, protecting your property from varying weather conditions, including heavy rain, where water is at risk of entering. Moreover, by adhering to good installation practices, your lead sheet can outperform other building materials-an assertion supported by a comprehensive 50-year warranty.Features & Benefits: Calder Lead Code 6 Roofing Lead Flashing Roll - 240mmCode 6 lead flashing suitable for flashings, flat roofing, parapet and tapered valley gutters, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, dormers, bay roofs and canopiesA natural metal that is 100% recyclable time after timeProtects against varying weather conditions with rain resistanceFlexible material that's easy to installHas a thermal Conductivity of 34.76W/m/°C and a melting point of 327.4°CDensity of 11.34g/cm³ and weighing approx. 30.05/m²Manufactured to BS EN 12588:2006 standardsDurable with a 50-year warrantyWith sustainability at its core since the mid-'90s, lead flashing has taken the UK by storm. Over one million tonnes have since graced roofs, showcasing their natural appeal and eco-friendliness. This is particularly crucial given the Earth's crust contains an estimated 290 million tonnes of the material for long-term use.Standards & CertificationBritish/European Standard: BS EN 12588 - 2006Please note: If you wish to cancel your order, please notify us within 24 hours of confirmation as per Calder's Cancellation Policy.

product.description: By Calder, this Roofing Lead Flashing is available in a roll, measuring 240mm wide by varying lengths. At 2.65mm thickness and weighing approx. 30.05/m², it adorns the roofs of churches, offices, factories, and public buildings. Specifically, this Code 6 lead can be used for flashings, flat roofing, parapet and tapered valley gutters, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, dormers, bay roofs and canopies. When it's time to dispose of this lead flashing, it can be salvaged repeatedly, as it is 100% recyclable as a natural metal material.The lead flashing is ideal for preventing rainwater from penetrating the property, with the addition of being easy to work with, has excellent shaping capabilities, is exceptionally durable, and features a distinctive grey patina. The patina is crucial, protecting your property from varying weather conditions, including heavy rain, where water is at risk of entering. Moreover, by adhering to good installation practices, your lead sheet can outperform other building materials-an assertion supported by a comprehensive 50-year warranty.Features & Benefits: Calder Lead Code 6 Roofing Lead Flashing Roll - 240mmCode 6 lead flashing suitable for flashings, flat roofing, parapet and tapered valley gutters, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, dormers, bay roofs and canopiesA natural metal that is 100% recyclable time after timeProtects against varying weather conditions with rain resistanceFlexible material that's easy to installHas a thermal Conductivity of 34.76W/m/°C and a melting point of 327.4°CDensity of 11.34g/cm³ and weighing approx. 30.05/m²Manufactured to BS EN 12588:2006 standardsDurable with a 50-year warrantyWith sustainability at its core since the mid-'90s, lead flashing has taken the UK by storm. Over one million tonnes have since graced roofs, showcasing their natural appeal and eco-friendliness. product.name: Everbuild Evercryl One Coat Acrylic Waterproof Coating
product.description: Available in a choice of sizes, this resin-based and fibre re-enforced Evercryl One Coat Acrylic Waterproof Coating is a roofing solution from Everbuild that is ideal for addressing common roofing problems. It is highly versatile and can be used on various roofing surfaces, providing instant repairs even on wet surfaces. The application process is simple with Evercryl being brush-applied, drying to a seamless and flexible membrane that is incredibly smooth and discourages the growth of algae and fungi. Thanks to its high level of fibre reinforcement, Evercryl can be implemented to bridge small cracks, and needs just a single-coat brush application to provide rapid and complete water protection - even in places that are prone to ponding. Features & Benefits: Everbuild Evercryl One Coat Acrylic Waterproof CoatingNo primer is needed on sound non-porous surfaces, saving you time and effortCan be applied in wet or frosty conditions down to -5°C for immediate leak repairEasily brush applied and dries to a smooth, flexible membrane, instantly waterproof, preventing wash off during applicationWhen applied, Evercryl becomes instantly waterproof, preventing any concern for wash off. This feature allows for emergency leaks to be addressed without waiting for the rain to stop. Additionally, Evercryl does not need a primer when applied to sound non-porous surfaces, making it a hassle-free option for roofing repairs.Evercryl is particularly suited to general sealing, maintenance and repair work, and waterproofing of most typical roofs in wet or dry conditions. It is compatible with fibre/cement, mastic asphalt, concrete, roofing felt, existing bituminous roof coatings and rigid PVCu, as well as corrugated iron, metals, slates, tiles, brickwork, copper, lead and zinc. You can also use Evercryl for waterproofing guttering (plastic and metal), downpipes, upstands, vents, gullies, leadwork and flashings.
product.variant_name: Everbuild Evercryl One Coat Acrylic Waterproof Coating - 2.5kg Grey

product.name: Once Weathered 50-75mm Interior Return Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec
product.description: This Eurodec Once Weathered Interior Concrete Coping Stone Return is perfect for guiding water towards the internal edges of parapet wall corners with a 75mm thickness on the outside and 50mm on the inside. With an assortment of colours and sizes for purchase, this coping stone return provides fantastic weather protection for masonry as well as a sleek and neat finish for walls. It is resilient against fading from UV rays and is manufactured from natural materials, meaning that the final finish is subject to weather and sunlight exposure. Features & Benefits: Once Weathered 50-75mm Interior Return Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecColours don't fade under UV rays in average climatesHandmade from concreteDurable method that lets rainwater flow towards the wall corner's interiorProtects tops of wallsAvailable in colours and sizes that fit in with your home and garden aesthetics This product has two 10mm wide drip grooves on the underside to prevent rainwater from causing stains and damage. Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is recommended that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it on this stone. You must also avoid high-pressure washers because the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the substrate and stone.Staining can occur from plants in the immediate area.

product.description: This Eurodec Once Weathered Interior Concrete Coping Stone Return is perfect for guiding water towards the internal edges of parapet wall corners with a 75mm thickness on the outside and 50mm on the inside. With an assortment of colours and sizes for purchase, this coping stone return provides fantastic weather protection for masonry as well as a sleek and neat finish for walls. It is resilient against fading from UV rays and is manufactured from natural materials, meaning that the final finish is subject to weather and sunlight exposure. Features & Benefits: Once Weathered 50-75mm Interior Return Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecColours don't fade under UV rays in average climatesHandmade from concreteDurable method that lets rainwater flow towards the wall corner's interiorProtects tops of wallsAvailable in colours and sizes that fit in with your home and garden aesthetics This product has two 10mm wide drip grooves on the underside to prevent rainwater from causing stains and damage. Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is recommended that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it on this stone. You must also avoid high-pressure washers because the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the substrate and stone.Staining can occur from plants in the immediate area.

These stones come in a range of colours to provide not only a practical benefit but also create a decorative finish to your walls that you can tie in with other features around your home and garden, including patio tiles and decking boards.To protect your wall from water penetration, drip grooves are positioned on the underside of the stone to direct rainwater away from your wall, allowing it to drip down to the ground. As well as preventing water damage to your walls, these coping stones will also protect against water staining, which can occur over time.  Features & Benefits: Once Weathered 50-75mm Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecAvailable in a variety of coloursHandmade using high strength, durable concreteResistant to UV rays in normal climate conditionsThis once weathered stone is thicker at one side than the other, creating a sloping effectPlease note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.
product.variant_name: Once Weathered 50-75mm Coping Stone by Eurodec 600mm x 450mm - Slate

product.name: Eurodec 50mm Flat Concrete Coping Stone
product.description: Eurodec’s high-strength 50mm Flat Concrete Coping Stone is ideal for creating a decorative finish to the top of your parapet or garden wall and acting as excellent protection from rainwater penetration. Featuring two 10mm wide drip grooves underneath, positioned 20mm from either side of the stone, it will help shield your wall from water damage and potential staining by allowing rainwater to drop to the floor.The corners have a slightly tapered finish because of how the coping stones are removed from their mould. Each corner is tapered no more than 10mm due to being handmade and is subject to the manufacturer’s tolerances.Features & Benefits: Eurodec 50mm Flat Concrete Coping StoneAvailable in a variety of colours and sizesHandmade from high strength, durable concreteResistant to UV and fading in normal climate conditionsDrip grooves help direct rainwater away from the wallCost-effective and reliable optionQuarried and moulded materialsThis Eurodec coping stone is made to order and resistant to UV in typical climate conditions. Thanks to its UV resistance, the colour will not fade in sunlight. As it is manufactured from natural, quarried materials, there will be variations in colour in different batches. It's also worth noting that the true finish will not be revealed until a period of exposure to sunlight and some weathering.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.Handmade parts are prone to 10mm tapering at the corners and manufacturing tolerances.
product.variant_name: Eurodec 50mm Flat Concrete Coping Stone 600mm x 350mm - Buff

Each corner is tapered no more than 10mm due to being handmade and is subject to the manufacturer’s tolerances.Features & Benefits: Eurodec 50mm Flat Concrete Coping StoneAvailable in a variety of colours and sizesHandmade from high strength, durable concreteResistant to UV and fading in normal climate conditionsDrip grooves help direct rainwater away from the wallCost-effective and reliable optionQuarried and moulded materialsThis Eurodec coping stone is made to order and resistant to UV in typical climate conditions. Thanks to its UV resistance, the colour will not fade in sunlight. As it is manufactured from natural, quarried materials, there will be variations in colour in different batches. It's also worth noting that the true finish will not be revealed until a period of exposure to sunlight and some weathering.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.Handmade parts are prone to 10mm tapering at the corners and manufacturing tolerances.

Featuring two 10mm wide drip grooves underneath, positioned 20mm from either side of the stone, it will help shield your wall from water damage and potential staining by allowing rainwater to drop to the floor.The corners have a slightly tapered finish because of how the coping stones are removed from their mould. Each corner is tapered no more than 10mm due to being handmade and is subject to the manufacturer’s tolerances.Features & Benefits: Eurodec 50mm Flat Concrete Coping StoneAvailable in a variety of colours and sizesHandmade from high strength, durable concreteResistant to UV and fading in normal climate conditionsDrip grooves help direct rainwater away from the wallCost-effective and reliable optionQuarried and moulded materialsThis Eurodec coping stone is made to order and resistant to UV in typical climate conditions. Thanks to its UV resistance, the colour will not fade in sunlight. As it is manufactured from natural, quarried materials, there will be variations in colour in different batches. It's also worth noting that the true finish will not be revealed until a period of exposure to sunlight and some weathering.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.Handmade parts are prone to 10mm tapering at the corners and manufacturing tolerances.
product.variant_name: DISCON - Eurodec 50mm Flat Concrete Coping Stone 600mm x 600mm - Buff

product.name: Concrete 50mm Flat Return Coping Stone by Eurodec
product.description: For protecting the top layer of your wall corners, this 50mm Concrete Flat Return Coping Stone is available in a variety of colours and sizes. It can be coordinated seamlessly with other Eurodec coping stones for a pleasing aesthetic with effective protection against water penetration.With two drip grooves at either side of the stone, rainwater can drip to the floor and save your wall any staining or damage. Eurodec coping stones are made to order and show impressive UV resistance as they will not fade in normal climate conditions. Due to the natural, quarried materials, variations in colour per batch can occur. Authentic finishes appear after a period of exposure to sunlight and weathering.Features & Benefits:  Concrete 50mm Flat Return Coping Stone by EurodecDifferent colour and sizes for purchaseResists UV damage in normal conditionsHandmade and natural, quarried flat coping stone return made from solid concreteKeeps the tops of corner sections of a wall protectedFinishes overall wall aestheticsIncludes drip grooves that divert rainwater drip away from the wallEurodec handmade coping stones and returns are subject to manufacturer's tolerances due to the manufacturing process. As stones are lifted from moulds, a slight tapering at the corners will occur but it is no more than 10mm.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.

It can be coordinated seamlessly with other Eurodec coping stones for a pleasing aesthetic with effective protection against water penetration.With two drip grooves at either side of the stone, rainwater can drip to the floor and save your wall any staining or damage. Eurodec coping stones are made to order and show impressive UV resistance as they will not fade in normal climate conditions. Due to the natural, quarried materials, variations in colour per batch can occur. Authentic finishes appear after a period of exposure to sunlight and weathering.Features & Benefits:  Concrete 50mm Flat Return Coping Stone by EurodecDifferent colour and sizes for purchaseResists UV damage in normal conditionsHandmade and natural, quarried flat coping stone return made from solid concreteKeeps the tops of corner sections of a wall protectedFinishes overall wall aestheticsIncludes drip grooves that divert rainwater drip away from the wallEurodec handmade coping stones and returns are subject to manufacturer's tolerances due to the manufacturing process. As stones are lifted from moulds, a slight tapering at the corners will occur but it is no more than 10mm.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.
product.variant_name: Eurodec 50mm Flat Concrete Coping Stone Return 600mm x 600mm (fits 600mm wide Coping Stone) - Slate

product.name: Twice Weathered 50-75mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec
product.description: With a 75mm thickness at the apex and 50mm thickness at the sides, this twice-weathered coping stone from Eurodec lets rainwater run off the top of the stone's surface and offers protection against standing water.With two 10mm wide drip grooves situated on the underside, this coping stone can help to divert rainwater away from your wall and inhibit potential staining and damage to your wall. Due to being made from natural, quarried materials, the colours of the coping stones from one batch to the next will inevitably have variations. Its truly finished appearance will not appear until a period of exposure to some weathering and sunlight.Features & Benefits: Twice Weathered 50-75mm Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecTwice-weathered coping stone75mm thick at the apex and 50mm thick at the sideHandmade from durable, high-strength concreteDrip grooves help to divert rainwater away from the wallUV resistant in normal climate conditionsAvailable in a variety of colour tonesRange of sizes to choose fromPlease note: You must not use acid-base cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is recommended that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. You must also steer clear of high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and diminish the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can occur from plants in close vicinity.
product.variant_name: Twice Weathered 50-75mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec 600mm x 300mm - Buff

Its truly finished appearance will not appear until a period of exposure to some weathering and sunlight.Features & Benefits: Twice Weathered 50-75mm Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecTwice-weathered coping stone75mm thick at the apex and 50mm thick at the sideHandmade from durable, high-strength concreteDrip grooves help to divert rainwater away from the wallUV resistant in normal climate conditionsAvailable in a variety of colour tonesRange of sizes to choose fromPlease note: You must not use acid-base cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is recommended that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. You must also steer clear of high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and diminish the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can occur from plants in close vicinity.

product.name: Weathered 4 Way 125mm Concrete Pier Cap by Eurodec
product.description: Available in different colours and sizes, and a fantastic addition to your gate pillars or parapet walls, this Four-way Weathered 125mm Concrete Pier Cap is from Eurodec. The high-strength, smooth concrete cap delivers a decorative and professional finish to projects and keeps walls protected from water damage while supporting the overall structures. You can coordinate this product with Eurodec's range of flat and weathered concrete coping stones.The product is handmade from natural, quarried materials. Due to this, some colours may vary slightly from one batch to the next. The final finish of the stone is not complete until it has undergone a period of exposure to sunlight and weathering. Eurodec coping stones can effectively resist the sun's UV rays in a common UK climate, which may cause fading over time.Features & Benefits: Weathered 4 Way 125mm Concrete Pier Cap by EurodecDifferent colours and sizes availableHandmade four-way weathered pier capOffers a decorative finish to gate pillars and parapet wallsResists UV damage in common UK climate conditionsWeathered four times for a symmetrical tapered effectDrip grooves guide rainwater away from the wallWith two drip grooves on either side of the stone, it allows rainwater to easily drip to the floor and away from your wall. In turn, damage and staining are significantly reduced. Please note: Acid-based cleaners must not be used on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.
product.variant_name: 4 Way Weathered Pier Cap by Eurodec 610mm x 610mm - Buff

product.name: Once Weathered 50-75mm Exterior Return Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec
product.description: Fantastic for parapet wall corners that need rainwater transported away from the installation, this Eurodec once weathered coping stone is 75mm thick on the inner side and 50mm thick on the outside edge of the stone. A slope is formed, in turn allowing rainwater to run away from the property. This protects the wall from water damage and staining.The array of colours means that you can suit your exterior coping stone to the aesthetic of your garden and home while simultaneously protecting the top layer of masonry for wall corners. Equipped with two 10mm wide drip grooves on either side of the stone's undersides, further protection is added to the wall. It helps to resist water penetration and staining by directing the water away. Features & Benefits: Once Weathered 50-75mm Exterior Return Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecFeatures drip grooves that help rainwater drip away from the wall75mm thick at the inner sides and 50mm thick at the outer, allowing rainwater to run off away from your propertyAllows you to protect the tops of corner sections of a wall whilst keeping a consistent aesthetic with the rest of the wallThese products are handmade and may feature mild tapering at the corners, no more than 10mm. The natural, quarried materials can also result in differing coping stone colours and final finishes will not be revealed until undergoing sunlight exposure. Can be purchased in a variety of colours and sizes.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.
product.variant_name: Eurodec 50-75mm Once Weathered Exterior Return 300mm x 400mm fits 300mm wide Coping Stone - Buff

product.name: Twice Weathered 35-50mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec
product.description: Manufactured from durable, smooth concrete, this twice weathered coping stone from Eurodec is 35mm thick at the edges and 50mm thick at the apex and will protect the top of your wall from water penetration. The simple weathered design feature allows rainwater to run off the top of the stones, preventing water from pooling. Available in a selection of colours, why not choose a colour that complements other features around your home or garden, such as patio tiles or decking boards?The stones feature drip grooves located on the underside of the stone, which help to divert rainwater away from your wall. They are 10mm wide and positioned 20mm from either side of the stone. These grooves help reduce water damage to the wall and prevent water staining, which can occur over prolonged exposure.Features & Benefits: Twice Weathered 35-50mm Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecAvailable in a variety of coloursHandmade twice weathered coping stone made from high strength, durable concreteResistant to UV in normal climate conditionsFeatures drip grooves that help rainwater drip away from the wallThis twice weathered coping stone is of equal thickness at the sides and is thicker at the apexDue to being manufactured from natural, quarried materials, there will inevitably be variations in some coping stone colours from one batch to another. It's also worth noting that the actual finish will not be revealed until a period of exposure to sunlight and some weathering has occurred. product.description: Fantastic for parapet wall corners that need rainwater transported away from the installation, this Eurodec once weathered coping stone is 75mm thick on the inner side and 50mm thick on the outside edge of the stone. A slope is formed, in turn allowing rainwater to run away from the property. This protects the wall from water damage and staining.The array of colours means that you can suit your exterior coping stone to the aesthetic of your garden and home while simultaneously protecting the top layer of masonry for wall corners. Equipped with two 10mm wide drip grooves on either side of the stone's undersides, further protection is added to the wall. It helps to resist water penetration and staining by directing the water away. Features & Benefits: Once Weathered 50-75mm Exterior Return Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecFeatures drip grooves that help rainwater drip away from the wall75mm thick at the inner sides and 50mm thick at the outer, allowing rainwater to run off away from your propertyAllows you to protect the tops of corner sections of a wall whilst keeping a consistent aesthetic with the rest of the wallThese products are handmade and may feature mild tapering at the corners, no more than 10mm. The natural, quarried materials can also result in differing coping stone colours and final finishes will not be revealed until undergoing sunlight exposure. Can be purchased in a variety of colours and sizes.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.

product.description: Fantastic for parapet wall corners that need rainwater transported away from the installation, this Eurodec once weathered coping stone is 75mm thick on the inner side and 50mm thick on the outside edge of the stone. A slope is formed, in turn allowing rainwater to run away from the property. This protects the wall from water damage and staining.The array of colours means that you can suit your exterior coping stone to the aesthetic of your garden and home while simultaneously protecting the top layer of masonry for wall corners. Equipped with two 10mm wide drip grooves on either side of the stone's undersides, further protection is added to the wall. It helps to resist water penetration and staining by directing the water away. Features & Benefits: Once Weathered 50-75mm Exterior Return Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecFeatures drip grooves that help rainwater drip away from the wall75mm thick at the inner sides and 50mm thick at the outer, allowing rainwater to run off away from your propertyAllows you to protect the tops of corner sections of a wall whilst keeping a consistent aesthetic with the rest of the wallThese products are handmade and may feature mild tapering at the corners, no more than 10mm. The natural, quarried materials can also result in differing coping stone colours and final finishes will not be revealed until undergoing sunlight exposure. Can be purchased in a variety of colours and sizes.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.

product.name: Twice Weathered 35-50mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec
product.description: Manufactured from durable, smooth concrete, this twice weathered coping stone from Eurodec is 35mm thick at the edges and 50mm thick at the apex and will protect the top of your wall from water penetration. The simple weathered design feature allows rainwater to run off the top of the stones, preventing water from pooling. Available in a selection of colours, why not choose a colour that complements other features around your home or garden, such as patio tiles or decking boards?The stones feature drip grooves located on the underside of the stone, which help to divert rainwater away from your wall. They are 10mm wide and positioned 20mm from either side of the stone. These grooves help reduce water damage to the wall and prevent water staining, which can occur over prolonged exposure.Features & Benefits: Twice Weathered 35-50mm Concrete Coping Stone by EurodecAvailable in a variety of coloursHandmade twice weathered coping stone made from high strength, durable concreteResistant to UV in normal climate conditionsFeatures drip grooves that help rainwater drip away from the wallThis twice weathered coping stone is of equal thickness at the sides and is thicker at the apexDue to being manufactured from natural, quarried materials, there will inevitably be variations in some coping stone colours from one batch to another. It's also worth noting that the actual finish will not be revealed until a period of exposure to sunlight and some weathering has occurred. All Eurodec coping stones are resistant to fading caused by UV rays in average climate conditions.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.

product.variant_name: Twice Weathered 35-50mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec 600mm x 140mm - Buff

product.name: Twice Weathered 50-75mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec Return
product.description: With a variety of decorative colour tone options to choose from, you can create a delightfully stylish finish for your parapet wall or garden thanks to this 50-75mm Twice Weathered Coping Stone Return from Eurodec.Not only does this twice-weathered coping return ensure you can maintain your coping stone design around corners, but it is also an efficient form of weather protection for the top layer of your wall. With 75mm thickness at the apex and 50mm thickness at the sides, it allows rainwater to run off effectively. Due to the handmade construction methods, it is subject to manufacturers' tolerances including when the stones are lifted from their moulds, they will have a slight tapering of no more than 10mm at the corners.Features & Benefits: Twice Weathered 50-75mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec ReturnOffers protection to the top corner sections of a wallKeeps a consistent aesthetic with the rest of the wall75mm thick at the apex and 50mm thick at the sidesAllows rainwater to run off efficientlyFeatures drip grooves to help rainwater drip away from the wallUV resistant in standard climate conditionsTwice weathered coping stone returnHandmade from solid concreteAvailable in a variety of colour tonesFeaturing two 10mm wide drip grooves situated 20mm from either side of its undersides, this coping stone will help to protect your walls from water penetration which, over time, can cause staining and damage. Instead of letting rainwater run down the sides of the stones and underneath towards the wall, it can drip down to the ground as it reaches the drip groove which provides protection for your wall.Made to order, this Eurodec coping stone is resilient against fading caused by UV rays in standard climate conditions. As it's fabricated from natural, quarried materials, there will be variations in colour in different batches. This stone will not reveal its complete finish until it has been exposed to sunlight and some weather over time.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.You are advised to test any cleaner on a small area before using it. You must also avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the substrate and stone.Staining can occur from plants in the immediate vicinity.

product.name: Twice Weathered 35-50mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec Return
product.description: Eurodec's twice weathered coping stone returns are an effective form of protection against the elements for the top layer of masonry at a wall's corner section. It will provide a stylish and professional finish to your parapet or garden wall and is available in a variety of colour options. The Eurodec 35-50mm Twice Weathered Coping Stone Return can be colour coordinated with other coping stones on your wall to maintain a seamless aesthetic.This twice weathered coping stone from Eurodec is 35mm thick at the outer edges and 50mm thick at the apex, ensuring rainwater can efficiently run off the top of the stone. Due to how these concrete returns are made, these handmade products are subject to manufacturers tolerances. Because of how the stones are lifted from their moulds, they each feature a slight tapering at the corners - this tapering is no more than 10mm.Features & Benefits: Twice Weathered 35-50mm Concrete Coping Stone by Eurodec ReturnAvailable in a variety of coloursHandmade twice weathered coping stone return made from solid concreteResistant to UV in normal climate conditions35mm thick at the sides and 50mm thick at the apex, allowing rainwater to run off efficientlyAllows you to protect the tops of corner sections of a wall whilst keeping a consistent aesthetic with the rest of the wallFeatures drip grooves that help rainwater drip away from the wallEurodec coping stones are made to order and are resistant to fading by UV in normal climate conditions. As they're manufactured from natural, quarried materials, there will be variations in colour in different batches. It's also worth noting that the stones will not reveal their authentic finish until they have had a period of exposure to sunlight and some weathering.The coping stone has two drip grooves positioned either side of the stone. This is to help rainwater drip to the floor, away from your wall. These drip grooves help to prevent damage to your wall and possible staining.Please note: You must not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.It is advised that you test any cleaner on a small area before using it. Similarly, you must avoid high-pressure washers as the jet can damage the stone's surface and weaken the bond between the stone and substrate.Staining can also arise from plants in the immediate vicinity.

product.name: Eurodec Slimline 30-55mm Once Weathered Concrete Coping Stone 600mm x 300mm
product.description: The Eurodec Slimline 30-55mm Once Weathered Concrete Coping Stone (600mm x 300mm) offers a sleek solution for protecting and finishing exterior walls. Crafted from high-strength concrete, this grey-coloured smooth coping stone is designed for durability and long-lasting performance. Its once weathered profile, with a slight slope, ensures efficient rainwater runoff. At the same time, the integrated drip grooves on both sides effectively channel water away from the wall, preventing moisture buildup and damage.With a reduced weight, this coping stone is easier to handle and install, making it a great choice for both DIY and professional projects.Features & Benefits: Eurodec Slimline 30-55mm Once Weathered Concrete Coping Stone 600mm x 300mmHandmade using high strength, durable concreteOnce weathered stone creates a sloping effectResistant to UV in normal climate conditionsPlease note: Do not use acid-based cleaners on Eurodec Concrete Coping Stones.Test any cleaner on a small area before using it. product.name: Naylor Underground Twinwall Water Ducting - 6m
product.description: With a generous 6m length and a range of diameters to choose from to suit your specific requirements, this Naylor Underground Twinwall Ducting in Blue offers an ideal solution for protecting water service pipes. Made from high-quality polyethylene, it features a twin-wall structure.Its smooth internal bore ensures your pipes glide through effortlessly, while the corrugated external profile provides exceptional strength and durability. Built for convenience, this Naylor Ducting is lightweight, making it easy to transport. Even in challenging conditions, its impact resistance at low temperatures stands strong. product.name: Titan D400 Ducting Access Chamber - 150mm Depth
product.description: Made from reprocessed, co-polymer polypropylene, this Titan Ducting Access Chamber is a resilient inspection chamber that effortlessly surpasses the demands of BSEN124 D400 load rating, showcasing its remarkable durability and adaptability across a vast spectrum of applications and eliminating the necessity for a concrete surround.When setting up this chamber, ensure the opening is approximately 100mm deeper than the chamber's required depth, incorporating the lid and frame. The width at the base of the opening should closely match the exterior dimensions of the Titan box section, allowing for an approximate 25mm allowance for adjustment. With the pavement level, maintain an excess of 100mm to 150mm over the Titan box section being utilised.Features & Benefits: Titan D400 Ducting Access Chamber - 150mm DepthMade from reprocessed, co-polymer polypropyleneExceeds BSEN124 D400 load ratingEliminates the need for concrete surround150mm depthSuitable for a wide range of applicationsHeavy-duty constructionEach wall contains entry ports at 110mmThe chamber's foundation can be created by employing a C30 dry mix at a 100mm depth, leaving a small aperture in the base to function as a natural soakaway. For optimal height and tilt customisation, consider utilising a galvanised steel frame with a composite lid. By situating the frame within the chamber and lifting it to the desired level, you can achieve a 100mm adjustment with each frame. Envelop the frame with C30 concrete for added stability.Pole boxes come in two standard sizes: 300mm x 300mm x 450mm deep and 450mm x 450mm x 450mm deep. However, custom sizes are also available upon request. The pole boxes securely encircle the traffic signal through a specially fabricated wrap-around jaw, and concreting the traffic signal pole is strongly advised for optimal performance and support.Please note: The images are provided by Plastech Ltd.

product.description: With a maximum weight load of 10 tonnes, this Galvanised Steel Recessed Cover and Polypropylene frame for Block Paving is suited to landscaping and driveway installations with a focus on safety and security. The square-to-round recessed manhole cover prevents the cutting of paving slabs around circular manhole cover openings, alleviating difficult and time-consuming methods.When completely installed, the manhole cover should blend seamlessly into the paving design to form a visually pleasing finish for your driveway or patio area. product.name: Water Based Deck Adhesive for ClassicBond
product.description:
This high strength low odour water based acrylic adhesive is specifically designed for use with ClassicBond and Firestone EPDM roofing membranes to a range of deck surfaces.
Designed to be roller applied to flat roof surfaces.
ClassicBond WBA will bond ClassicBond EPDM membrane to a range of conventional timber roof surfaces e.g. plywood, OSB. All boards should be resistant to moisture but not sealed with adhesive repellent waxes or other non-absorbent systems. If in doubt a small test area should be laid. Certain roof surfaces may not be suitable for use with this adhesive, for example, non-porous roof decks or those of low vapour permeability, i.e. metal or existing GRP.

product.name: EasyLiner B125 Ducting Access Chamber - 320mm Depth
product.description: Manufactured from recycled polypropylene, this EasyLiner Ducting Access Chambers stands as a resilient and lightweight solution that effortlessly combines strength and rigidity. With its user-friendly assembly process, all components lock together, creating a sturdy structure suitable for various applications.Designed for concrete backfilling, this chamber system offers an ideal alternative to rotationally moulded liners, providing distinct cost and technical advantages. Featuring adaptable knockouts to accommodate 60mm, 110mm and 180mm pipes, this chamber can also be easily drilled to fit other pipe diameters. Furthermore, it eliminates the need for heavy lifting equipment, efficiently streamlining the installation.Features & Benefits: EasyLiner B125 Ducting Access Chamber - 320mm DepthLightweight, robust, recycled plastic constructionEasy interlocking assembly for sturdy structureIdeal for concrete backfillingCost-effective alternative to rotationally moulded linersSupplied flat-packed or fully assembledAdaptable knockouts for 60mm, 110mm and 180mm pipesCan be drilled for other pipe diametersNo mechanical lifting equipment requiredB125 weight classAvailable in a range of sizes
