product.name: Wallbarn Universal Adjustable Pedestal For Decking and Paving
product.description: Available in a selection of height options, this Wallbarn Universal Adjustable Paving and Decking Support from Wallbarn is designed to form flat surfaces for paved or decked structures. While especially suited to use alongside porcelain tiles on podiums and flat roofs, these pedestals provide adjustments that are precise to the millimetre with the telescopic stem across various flat surfaces.The free-standing system requires no fixings, in turn sparing below membranes from hindrance and suiting warm roofs and inverted waterproofing systems. The pedestals create a gap between the paving or decking and the sub-deck for the purpose of ventilation, while effectively hiding unpleasant pipes and cables.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn Universal Adjustable Pedestal For Decking and PavingVirgin fibre injection moulded polypropylene structureCompressive Strength between +20°C and -40°CCost-effective and sturdyEnd of Linear Behaviour: 6,700N = 683kgWeight Tolerance: Maximum Load 11,493 N = 1,171kg200mm base plate diameter and 120mm headpiece diameter55mm distance between lugs which are 10mm x 2mm (4mm upon request)-40°C to 75°CIntegrated acoustic shim on the headpieceLaying DeckingAdjusting the pedestal height instead of cutting furring’s quickens installation and accommodates falls in the roof deck. Joist bearers easily slot between joist holders when situated a maximum of 600mm apart. A joist framework is formed for a sturdy, stable, weight-bearing surface to take the upper surfacing and the top decking can then be fixed onto the joists with wood screws or discrete fixings. You can make height adjustments when the timber joist framework is in place to reduce both time and labour. Raising the decking off the sub-deck lets water drain beneath the decking to: avoid standing water on the surface, prolong timber lifespan, stop ponding, and limit resulting slip hazards. Joists are not standing directly on the waterproofing membrane, or insulation, to avoid damage.Standards & CertificationConforms to quality management systems standard UNI EN ISO 9001 2008Fire rating classed as 'EUROCLASSE E' according to EN 135011 2009.
product.variant_name: DISCON - Wallbarn Universal Adjustable Pedestal For Decking and Paving Height - 125mm to 160mm

product.name: Wallbarn Drainage Geotextile 300gsm Grey Recycled Polypropylene Roll - 1000mm
product.description: The Wallbarn Drainage Geotextile 300gsm Grey Recycled Polypropylene Roll is a versatile solution designed to excel in drainage, filtration, separation, protection, and soil reinforcement tasks. Made from a non-woven, thermally bonded material, these 1-metre wide rolls are available in various lengths, boasting strength and flexibility.This geotextile serves as a superior separation layer, allowing water to pass through the soil unhindered, preventing clogging, and enhancing soil stability without saturation. Its uniform composition ensures there are no weak spots, guaranteeing reliability in all your projects.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn Drainage Geotextile 300gsm Grey Recycled Polypropylene Roll - 1000mmProtects the membrane from damage and filters solid particles awayRange of lengths available300gsm densityNon-woven recycled polypropylene materialSuited to numerous applicationsHigh in strength and flexibilityBoosts the strength and stability of soilUniform roll with no weak points in layersWith its protective capabilities, it shields membranes from damage and filters out solid particles, making it perfect for land drainage, tunnels, landfills, roofing protection, foundations, railway and road reinforcement, and erosion control along watercourses and highway banks.Additionally, it excels in structural waterproofing systems and is an ideal choice for use between paving slabs and insulation boards on balconies and inverted roof systems. Standards & CertificationInternational Standard: ISO 9001/2000Please note: For full technical details please contact our sales team as technical data on all the geotextile fabrics can be supplied with the appropriate test scores. Our team would also be happy to recommend the appropriate material if you contact them with your requirements.

product.name: Wallbarn Universal Extra Adjustable Pedestal for Decking and Paving
product.description: Wallbarn's Universal  Extra adjustable pedestal range is suitable for both paving and decking. They are particularly ideal for porcelain tiles on flat roofs and podiums. Even flat roofs are built to a small fall to allow adequate drainage. The adjustable pedestals have a telescopic stem which allow you to make millimetre-precise manual adjustments in height in order to achieve a flat upper surface. Universal Extra pedestals are a freestanding system, so no fixings are made through the membrane underneath, ideal for warm roofs and inverted waterproofing systems. They also come with an integrated acoustic shim on the headpiece. The pedestals create a cavity between the sub-deck and the paving/decking surface which helps ventilate the structure and allows services such as pipes and cables to be hidden from view.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn Universal Extra Adjustable Pedestal for Decking and PavingSuitable for paving and decking, including porcelain tiles on flat roofs and podiumsAdjustable telescopic stem for precise height adjustmentsUniversal Extra pedestals are freestanding, meaning no fixings through the membraneIdeal for warm roofs and inverted waterproofing systemsIntegrated acoustic shim on the headpieceCreates a cavity for ventilation and hiding pipes and cablesHeight markings every 10mm on stems for easy adjustmentEach pedestal includes an extension shankMaximum load is 11,493 N (1,171 kg)Wallbarn's Universal EXTRA pedestals give installers greater flexibility when working across surfaces with very large differences in deck level as the height range is far greater across just three products: 85mm-135mm, 125mm-215mm and 210mm-380mm.Often installers cannot be sure exactly where the fall will be on the roof or by how much. These pedestals have the heights marked out every 10mm on the side of stems, so users can see at a glance the exact height they are adjusting to without having to constantly re-measure. Each EXTRA pedestal comes complete with an extension shank which clicks into the baseplate. The threaded stem is then placed into the top of it. Paving applicationsPositioning lugs create uniform spacing between each slab, allowing rainwater to run between and under the slabs, so no standing water is left on the surfaceBeing a suspended system, the weight of the slab holds everything in placeHeight adjustments can be made whilst the slab is in place, saving time and labour10mm high lugs mean they are ideal for supporting thin tilesLugs can be snapped by hand for stretcher bond and irregular laying patternsLaying deckingAdjusting the height of the pedestals, rather than cutting furring's means installers can install decking onto structural decks much more quicklyPedestals are adjusted to accommodate the fall in the roof deckPlaced a maximum of 600mm apart, the joist bearers are simply slotted between the joist holdersA joist framework is constructed to create a sturdy, stable, weight-bearing surface to take the upper surfacingThe top decking is then fixed onto the joists using ordinary wood screws or hidden fixingsHeight adjustments can be made whilst the timber joist framework is in place, saving time and labourRaising the decking off the sub-deck allows water to drain freely under the decking so there is no standing water left on the surface, preventing ponding and associated slip hazards, and extending the lifespan of the timber.Joists are not standing directly on the waterproofing membrane, or insulation, preventing damage to it.

product.name: Wallbarn TD Minipad Adjustable Support Pad
product.description: The TD Minipad Adjustable Support Pad by Wallbarn is an effective solution for your suspended timber decking system. Manufactured from high-quality virgin fibre injection-moulded polypropylene, these support pads are engineered to ensure excellent strength and durability, offering incredible weight tolerance of up to 683kg.Designed with precision and innovation in mind, the TD Minipad is ideal for areas with low height thresholds, where minor height adjustments are required for a flawless finish. It supports timber joists for top surface deck boards, making it perfect for balconies, terraces, and podium decks. Features & Benefits: Wallbarn TD Minipad Adjustable Support PadIdeal for suspended timber decking systemsMade from high-quality virgin fibre injection-moulded polypropyleneImpressive weight tolerance of up to 683kgPrecise millimetre-height adjustments with telescopic stemsDiiferent sizes availableSuitable for balconies, terraces, and podium decksFast and easy installation, saving time and labour150mm diameter headpieces and baseplates for stabilityEnhanced drainage, ventilation, and concealed space for servicesWhat sets the TD Minipad apart is its millimetre-precise height adjustment capabilities. The telescopic stems allow for easy and fast installation, enabling you to achieve the desired height with minimal effort. These adjustable support pads save you both time and labour during construction, as adjustments can be made while the timber joists are in place. The 150mm diameter headpieces and baseplates ensure stability and reliability.In addition to its functionality, the TD Minipad offers enhanced drainage with its suspended system, preventing standing water on the surface. It creates a cavity beneath the decking, providing ventilation and concealed space for pipes and cables.Please note: A range of different lug size, slope correctors, levelling shims and accessories are available for use with TD Megapads from Wallbarn.Wallbarn recommends that TD Minipads should be positioned a maximum of 600mm apart.

product.name: Wallbarn Protecto-Drain 20m Cavity Drain Membrane
product.description: The Wallbarn Protecto-Drain 8 Cavity Drain Membrane is a perfect solution for safeguarding foundations, basements, and subterranean structures. This dimpled HDPE membrane, also known as a Cavity Drain or Fin Drain, offers superior protection against mechanical damage while creating a vital air gap between the waterproofing and the earth.This innovative design establishes a reliable drainage channel, preventing hydrostatic pressure buildup within the structure, ensuring a dry and robust foundation. With its lightweight construction and easy installation, it's a cost-effective choice for various applications, including retaining walls, erosion control, road construction, and basement waterproofing.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn Protecto-Drain 20m Cavity Drain MembraneIdeal for safeguarding foundations, basements, and subterranean structuresFeatures a dimpled surface and offers superior mechanical damage protectionCreates an air gap between waterproofing and the earthPrevents hydrostatic pressure buildup, ensuring a dry and robust foundationLightweight and easy to installSuitable for retaining walls, erosion control, road construction, and more

product.name: Wallbarn TPE Extension Shank
product.description:
Wallbarn extension shanks are designed to fix up with the drainage outlets to increase the reach into the parapet wall or drainage channel.
Often the ducts and channels will have to pass through a long run of concrete before reaching a suitable area to install the HDPE drainpipe, so an extension of a fully waterproof sealed connector will be required. These extension shanks are specially designed to fit in with the full range of Wallbarn circular outlets.
They are made from TPE but can still be used with EPDM and PVC outlets. They are manufactured to a slight cone shape, so the end of the circular outlet slots inside the top of the extension shank. The two membranes are bonded together using silicone adhesive.
Please note: Installers of PVC waterproofing systems should always inform waterproofing manufacturer before using these two materials together in order check the status of the warranty.
product.variant_name: Extension Shank / Pipe 240mm Long - 40mm Diameter

product.name: Wallbarn TPE Perforated Roof Drain Outlet
product.description: Available in different lengths and diameters, this perforated roof drain outlet from Wallbarn is made of flexible and strong TPE (Thermoplastic elastomer). It works to add a waterproof element to drainage holes on both balconies and roofs that are already equipped with bituminous waterproofing membranes. With resilience to weathering and UV rays, this outlet can withstand temperature changes up to 120°C and resist brittleness in lower temperatures.Where holes are made in concrete decks, this outlet is easily installed after a layer of waterproof membrane and then coated with a second layer on top of the flange - which has a perforated edge for the membrane to settle in for a secure and sturdy bond. The 240mm shank fits into an HDPE (High-density polyethylene) pipe snuggly and is slightly coned to ease the fit and provide additional stability. Water is prevented from travelling back up thanks to the two rings that emulate a drain tap, and the serrated area allows for a drain guard to join the system.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn TPE Perforated Roof Drain OutletMade from TPE (Thermoplastic elastomer) for durability, resilience, and waterproofingInstalled alongside two layers of a waterproofing membranePerforated flange to help bondingConed shank with serrated area to ease installation and allow for drain guardsUV stable and able to withstand high (120°C) and low temperatures.Compatible with SBS (Styrene Butadiene Styrene) and APP (Atactic Polypropylene Membrane) membranes, such as built-up (felt), hot melt, mastic asphalt, and other liquid-applied membranes.Please note: Do not allow direct contact with concrete as this can allow water to find its way beneath the outlet and cause damage.Assure that a layer of membrane is fully bonded to the outlet flange and the first layer for completely watertight bonds.
product.variant_name: Roofdrain Outlet (TPE) Perforated 600mm High - 80mm Diameter

With resilience to weathering and UV rays, this outlet can withstand temperature changes up to 120°C and resist brittleness in lower temperatures.Where holes are made in concrete decks, this outlet is easily installed after a layer of waterproof membrane and then coated with a second layer on top of the flange - which has a perforated edge for the membrane to settle in for a secure and sturdy bond. The 240mm shank fits into an HDPE (High-density polyethylene) pipe snuggly and is slightly coned to ease the fit and provide additional stability. Water is prevented from travelling back up thanks to the two rings that emulate a drain tap, and the serrated area allows for a drain guard to join the system.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn TPE Perforated Roof Drain OutletMade from TPE (Thermoplastic elastomer) for durability, resilience, and waterproofingInstalled alongside two layers of a waterproofing membranePerforated flange to help bondingConed shank with serrated area to ease installation and allow for drain guardsUV stable and able to withstand high (120°C) and low temperatures.Compatible with SBS (Styrene Butadiene Styrene) and APP (Atactic Polypropylene Membrane) membranes, such as built-up (felt), hot melt, mastic asphalt, and other liquid-applied membranes.Please note: Do not allow direct contact with concrete as this can allow water to find its way beneath the outlet and cause damage.Assure that a layer of membrane is fully bonded to the outlet flange and the first layer for completely watertight bonds.

product.name: Wallbarn BALANCE EXTRA Adjustable Pedestal
product.description: The specially designed Wallbarn BALANCE EXTRA adjustable pedestals are ideal for decking and paving projects. The self-levelling headpieces have been developed to give extra scope and flexibility, so differences are accommodated within the surface beneath the pedestal. The BALANCE also helps alleviate blemishes and ridges in the sub-deck or changes in the thickness of your paving slabs which makes the upper surface uneven.Whereas BALANCE pedestals are available in heights from 25mm up to 395mm, BALANCE EXTRA pedestals give an extended height range from 100mm up to 395mm in just three different products.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn BALANCE EXTRA Adjustable PedestalIdeal for decking and pavingEasier and faster than old fashioned methodsSpecially designed to give extra scope and flexibilityHeight: 222mm - 392mm, 137mm - 227mm, 97mm - 147mmType: AdjustableThis suspended system uses the weight of the slab or decking to hold everything into place. Rainwater runs between and underneath, so there is no standing water left on the surface of your floor. This dramatically reduces the risk of slipping and causing serious injury.You can hide unsightly objects such as cables, water pipes and drainage outlets underneath the paving slabs as well, improving the aesthetics of your floor.Decking ApplicationsWhen used with timber decking systems, the lugs(fins) are set out towards the edges of the headpiece to give a 55mm gap between each one. This allows a timber joist to fit between the lugs (fins), and then decking boards are can be fixed to the joist frame. Installers are able to create decking surfaces onto structural decks much faster by adjusting the height of pedestals rather than cutting furrings.Paving ApplicationsThe self-levelling headpiece design has four positioning lugs (fins) laid out in a crucifix formation set towards the edges of the headpiece. The design means that it robust, stable and durable. The headpiece has separate parts that allow up to 5% or 2.86 degrees of slope correction in all directions. This allows smooth movement and positioning of the paving slab. Slips and sharp tilting are avoided owing to the superior design and solid manufacture. The lugs (fins) separate paving slabs and tiles on the headpiece to allow sufficient drainage between slabs, which create a uniform paving line, so the slabs are laid entirely straight. A rubber anti-shock pad can slot onto the headpiece to give a better grip to the slab and help insulate against vibration and noise travelling through to the deck beneath.Please note: Shims, slope correctors, cross spacers and other accessories can also be used with the BALANCE Pedestals.
product.variant_name: Wallbarn BALANCE EXTRA Adjustable Paving Pedestal - 97mm to 147mm

The self-levelling headpieces have been developed to give extra scope and flexibility, so differences are accommodated within the surface beneath the pedestal. The BALANCE also helps alleviate blemishes and ridges in the sub-deck or changes in the thickness of your paving slabs which makes the upper surface uneven.Whereas BALANCE pedestals are available in heights from 25mm up to 395mm, BALANCE EXTRA pedestals give an extended height range from 100mm up to 395mm in just three different products.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn BALANCE EXTRA Adjustable PedestalIdeal for decking and pavingEasier and faster than old fashioned methodsSpecially designed to give extra scope and flexibilityHeight: 222mm - 392mm, 137mm - 227mm, 97mm - 147mmType: AdjustableThis suspended system uses the weight of the slab or decking to hold everything into place. Rainwater runs between and underneath, so there is no standing water left on the surface of your floor. This dramatically reduces the risk of slipping and causing serious injury.You can hide unsightly objects such as cables, water pipes and drainage outlets underneath the paving slabs as well, improving the aesthetics of your floor.Decking ApplicationsWhen used with timber decking systems, the lugs(fins) are set out towards the edges of the headpiece to give a 55mm gap between each one. This allows a timber joist to fit between the lugs (fins), and then decking boards are can be fixed to the joist frame. Installers are able to create decking surfaces onto structural decks much faster by adjusting the height of pedestals rather than cutting furrings.Paving ApplicationsThe self-levelling headpiece design has four positioning lugs (fins) laid out in a crucifix formation set towards the edges of the headpiece. The design means that it robust, stable and durable. The headpiece has separate parts that allow up to 5% or 2.86 degrees of slope correction in all directions. This allows smooth movement and positioning of the paving slab. Slips and sharp tilting are avoided owing to the superior design and solid manufacture. The lugs (fins) separate paving slabs and tiles on the headpiece to allow sufficient drainage between slabs, which create a uniform paving line, so the slabs are laid entirely straight. A rubber anti-shock pad can slot onto the headpiece to give a better grip to the slab and help insulate against vibration and noise travelling through to the deck beneath.Please note: Shims, slope correctors, cross spacers and other accessories can also be used with the BALANCE Pedestals.

product.name: Wallbarn Adjustable Paving Minipad
product.description: Wallbarn Adjustable Paving Minipads are designed to create level suspended paving systems where installation heights are restricted. Ideal for balconies, terraces, flat roofs, podium decks and paved areas, their telescopic design enables precise height adjustment without lifting slabs.Manufactured from durable virgin fibre polypropylene, Minipads are built to withstand year-round weather exposure. The 150mm headpiece and baseplate provide stable support for up to four slab corners, while integrated spacer lugs ensure consistent joint spacing for effective drainage and a professional finish. The raised paving system also creates a cavity beneath the slabs, improving ventilation and providing space to conceal pipes and cables.Features & Benefits: Wallbarn Adjustable Paving MinipadTelescopic height-adjustable paving supportIdeal for low-height threshold installationsSuitable for balconies, terraces and roof decksPrecise adjustment without lifting slabsSupports up to four slab cornersIntegrated spacers for even joint gaps

product.name: Wallbarn BALANCE Adjustable Pedestal
product.description: Ideal for both decking and paving installations, this BALANCE pedestal from Wallbarn has self-levelling headpieces that provide increased scope and flexibility and accommodate any differences in your deck's surface beneath the pedestal.Available in a range of height options from 25mm up to 395mm, this BALANCE pedestal adjusts any unevenness that can occur due to deck ridges and blemishes. Hiding water pipes, cables and drainage outlets to improve aesthetic integrity, this BALANCE pedestal can enhance your building's footprint. It can also be used in collaboration with cross spacers, shims, slope correctors and various other accessories. Features & Benefits: Wallbarn BALANCE Adjustable PedestalTime-saving installation processHides unsightly pipework and cablesPrevents slippery surfaces from pooled waterFixes uneven surfacesAvailable in a range of heightsVersatile across decking and paving applicationsTo save time during installation, the telescopic stem can be twisted by hand and helps you to create a completely flat upper surface. As a suspended system, the weight of the decking or slab keeps everything positioned correctly in place. Rainwater can easily drain and run between and underneath to minimise slippery surfaces and avoid pooling.Thanks to the headpiece and lugs (fins), this BALANCE pedestal is straightforward to apply to decking and paving. They ensure a quicker and stronger installation, prevent tilting and create uniform lines for drainage.Please note: For extra height, BALANCE EXTRA pedestals are available and provide 100mm up to 395mm in just three different products.

product.name: Wallbarn Mega Balance Self-Levelling Paving & Decking Pedestal
product.description: Wallbarn's Mega Balance Self-Levelling Pedestals are an easy-to-install four-in-one solution that you can use in various applications, thanks to its ingenious headpiece design that supports not only decking joists and bearers but also paving slabs and tiles.With a weight tolerance of over two tonnes per unit and a height range of 25mm up to 1025mm, this heavy-duty suspended system means the weight of the paving slabs or tiles ballasts themselves securely into position. Each pedestal is made from non-hazardous, fully recyclable injection moulded polypropylene without fillers, which will provide long-term durability and performance. They have even been laboratory tested at -40°C to +75°C to prove they will not shatter in sub-zero temperatures. Features & Benefits: Wallbarn Mega Balance Self-Levelling Paving & Decking PedestalAn easy-to-install pedestal that supports both decking boards and paving slabs/tilesA self-levelling and fixed head pedestal all in oneHas a weight tolerance of over two tonnes per unit and a height range of 25mm up to 1025mmSelf-levelling headpiece moves up to 5% or 2.86° in all directionsYou can adjust your pedestals slightly even after a project has been completed, saving on labour and improving health and safetyThe ‘grey nut’ can be pressed into the centre of the headpiece to lock the self-levelling mechanism should installers require fixed headsThe headpiece comes with an integrated rubber anti-shock pad, which clicks into place to give a better grip and improves vibration and noise insulationMade from non-hazardous, fully recyclable injection moulded polypropylene without fillersLaboratory tested at -40°C to +75°C to prove they will not shatter in sub-zero temperatures1 black nut for every four units purchased.While the headpiece is self-levelling as standard, by using the 'grey nut', the head can be locked rigid within the same unit. If you need to adjust the height of your pedestals, you can do this using the 'yellow' and 'silver' key tools, even on a completed paving project, without having to lift and remove any of the slabs.For Paving ApplicationsThe self-levelling headpiece incorporates 4 x 4mm wide positioning lugs (fins) integrated with the headpiece, helping to create a uniform paving line for your slabs and tiles. Not only does it aid the overall aesthetic of your paving, but with the headpiece’s lugs separating your tiles, this allows for improved drainage. To install, simply lay the paving slab or tile onto one segment of the headpiece so four corners of your paving slabs or tiles rest on each headpiece. This will ensure four pedestals support each corner of a slab or tile, providing stable and secure support. For Decking ApplicationsThe four positioning lugs on the self-levelling headpiece are set 55mm apart so a 50mm wide joist/bearer can be loose-laid between them easily. It is loose-laid rather than mechanically fixed in case of expansion or movement, which can cause differences between the structure beneath and the decking over time. The lugs are high enough to house the joists securely, giving you flexibility in your decking project. When laying your decking, the joists/bearers should be cross-fitted together to form a secure framework. The upper surface decking boards can then be mechanically fixed to the joist frame according to the specification and assembly instructions of the deck board supplier. Standards & CertificationFire Classification: EUROCLASS E according to EN 13501-1-2009Please note: You will only receive 1 black nut for every four units purchased. Additional black Nuts can be purchased.In decking applications, there is no need to cut furrings as the pedestals are adjusted in height to create a flat frame level.The headpiece is self-levelling as standard. Installers may or may not wish to click the grey nut into the headpiece to lock the head, depending on the characteristics of the decking project.There are cut lines on the underside of the baseplates should installers need to pave directly up to walls or parapets - do not cut bases beyond these cut lines.Special CLASS B1 (EN 13501-1-2009) rated pedestals can be manufactured upon request.

product.name: Wallbarn Mega Balance Self-Levelling Paving & Decking Pedestal
product.description: Wallbarn's Mega Balance Self-Levelling Pedestals are an easy-to-install four-in-one solution that you can use in various applications, thanks to its ingenious headpiece design that supports not only decking joists and bearers but also paving slabs and tiles.With a weight tolerance of over two tonnes per unit and a height range of 25mm up to 1025mm, this heavy-duty suspended system means the weight of the paving slabs or tiles ballasts themselves securely into position. Each pedestal is made from non-hazardous, fully recyclable injection moulded polypropylene without fillers, which will provide long-term durability and performance. They have even been laboratory tested at -40°C to +75°C to prove they will not shatter in sub-zero temperatures. Features & Benefits: Wallbarn Mega Balance Self-Levelling Paving & Decking PedestalAn easy-to-install pedestal that supports both decking boards and paving slabs/tilesA self-levelling and fixed head pedestal all in oneHas a weight tolerance of over two tonnes per unit and a height range of 25mm up to 1025mmSelf-levelling headpiece moves up to 5% or 2.86° in all directionsYou can adjust your pedestals slightly even after a project has been completed, saving on labour and improving health and safetyThe ‘grey nut’ can be pressed into the centre of the headpiece to lock the self-levelling mechanism should installers require fixed headsThe headpiece comes with an integrated rubber anti-shock pad, which clicks into place to give a better grip and improves vibration and noise insulationMade from non-hazardous, fully recyclable injection moulded polypropylene without fillersLaboratory tested at -40°C to +75°C to prove they will not shatter in sub-zero temperatures1 black nut for every four units purchased.While the headpiece is self-levelling as standard, by using the 'grey nut', the head can be locked rigid within the same unit. If you need to adjust the height of your pedestals, you can do this using the 'yellow' and 'silver' key tools, even on a completed paving project, without having to lift and remove any of the slabs.For Paving ApplicationsThe self-levelling headpiece incorporates 4 x 4mm wide positioning lugs (fins) integrated with the headpiece, helping to create a uniform paving line for your slabs and tiles. Not only does it aid the overall aesthetic of your paving, but with the headpiece’s lugs separating your tiles, this allows for improved drainage. To install, simply lay the paving slab or tile onto one segment of the headpiece so four corners of your paving slabs or tiles rest on each headpiece. This will ensure four pedestals support each corner of a slab or tile, providing stable and secure support. For Decking ApplicationsThe four positioning lugs on the self-levelling headpiece are set 55mm apart so a 50mm wide joist/bearer can be loose-laid between them easily. It is loose-laid rather than mechanically fixed in case of expansion or movement, which can cause differences between the structure beneath and the decking over time. The lugs are high enough to house the joists securely, giving you flexibility in your decking project. When laying your decking, the joists/bearers should be cross-fitted together to form a secure framework. The upper surface decking boards can then be mechanically fixed to the joist frame according to the specification and assembly instructions of the deck board supplier. Standards & CertificationFire Classification: EUROCLASS E according to EN 13501-1-2009Please note: You will only receive 1 black nut for every four units purchased. Additional black Nuts can be purchased.In decking applications, there is no need to cut furrings as the pedestals are adjusted in height to create a flat frame level.The headpiece is self-levelling as standard. Installers may or may not wish to click the grey nut into the headpiece to lock the head, depending on the characteristics of the decking project.There are cut lines on the underside of the baseplates should installers need to pave directly up to walls or parapets - do not cut bases beyond these cut lines.Special CLASS B1 (EN 13501-1-2009) rated pedestals can be manufactured upon request.

Installers may or may not wish to click the grey nut into the headpiece to lock the head, depending on the characteristics of the decking project.There are cut lines on the underside of the baseplates should installers need to pave directly up to walls or parapets - do not cut bases beyond these cut lines.Special CLASS B1 (EN 13501-1-2009) rated pedestals can be manufactured upon request.

product.name: Wallbarn Plastic Extension Plank

product.name: Pavestone Amalfi Gris Light Grey Porcelain Paving Slabs - 900mm x 600mm
product.description: 900mm x 600mm Pavestone Amalfi Gris Light Grey Porcelain Paving Slabs feature a soft light grey tone with silver and white highlights, presented in a refined stone-effect pattern. product.name: Midland Lead Code 7 Cast Lead Roof Flashing
product.description: This roof flashing is crafted from Code 7 lead, a heavier and more robust option designed for applications where high strength and longevity are essential. With an impressive 3.15mm thickness, it provides exceptional resistance to weathering, movement, and creep, making it ideal for demanding roofing details and long-term performance exceeding 100 years. Manufactured by Midland Lead from 100% recycled materials.The lead is produced using a precision machine-casting process, where a rotating, water-cooled drum is dipped into molten lead to create a consistently thick and uniform sheet. Once formed, the lead is lifted cleanly from the drum, rolled into coils, and cut to size, ensuring a premium-quality finish that is easy to handle.Features & Benefits: Midland Lead Code 7 Cast Lead Roof Flashing35.7kg/m² nominal weight3.15mm thicknessMachine castBBA Certificate No. 86/1764100% recyclable and sustainableLasts over 100 yearsWhat is Machine Cast Lead?Both cast and milled lead are fabricated according to the same tolerances, codes, analysis and permitted sizes, however, cast lead outperforms milled lead when comparing the strength and creep resistance. Machine Cast Lead has a clean non-oily finish, which means it's ready to use and be fitted in all weather.Application: flat roofing, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, parapet, box and tapered valley gutters, pitched valley gutters, bay tops & canopies, dormersPlease note: To avoid thermal expansion and contraction issues with lead flashing, individual flashing pieces must not exceed one metre in length. Due to temperature fluctuations, regular spaced expansion joints must be used.

Manufactured by Midland Lead from 100% recycled materials.The lead is produced using a precision machine-casting process, where a rotating, water-cooled drum is dipped into molten lead to create a consistently thick and uniform sheet. Once formed, the lead is lifted cleanly from the drum, rolled into coils, and cut to size, ensuring a premium-quality finish that is easy to handle.Features & Benefits: Midland Lead Code 7 Cast Lead Roof Flashing35.7kg/m² nominal weight3.15mm thicknessMachine castBBA Certificate No. 86/1764100% recyclable and sustainableLasts over 100 yearsWhat is Machine Cast Lead?Both cast and milled lead are fabricated according to the same tolerances, codes, analysis and permitted sizes, however, cast lead outperforms milled lead when comparing the strength and creep resistance. Machine Cast Lead has a clean non-oily finish, which means it's ready to use and be fitted in all weather.Application: flat roofing, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, parapet, box and tapered valley gutters, pitched valley gutters, bay tops & canopies, dormersPlease note: To avoid thermal expansion and contraction issues with lead flashing, individual flashing pieces must not exceed one metre in length. Due to temperature fluctuations, regular spaced expansion joints must be used.

product.name: Midland Lead Code 5 Cast Lead Roof Flashing
product.description: This roof flashing is manufactured from Code 5 lead, offering excellent durability alongside superior malleability, and typically lasting over one hundred years. It is environmentally friendly and machine cast by Midland Lead using 100% recycled raw materials, whilst also certified by the British Board of Agrément (BBA).The production process involves dipping a rotating water-cooled drum into molten lead, where the sheet forms on the immersed surface before being peeled away at the top. It is then wound onto spools and cut into rolls for convenient use.Features & Benefits: Midland Lead Code 5 Cast Lead Roof Flashing25kg/m² nominal weight2.24mm thicknessMachine castBBA Certificate No. 86/1764Outperforms the strength and creep resistance of milled lead100% recyclable and sustainableTypically lasts over 100 yearsWhat is Machine Cast Lead?Both cast and milled lead are fabricated according to the same tolerances, codes, analysis and permitted sizes, however, cast lead outperforms milled lead when comparing the strength and creep resistance. Machine Cast Lead has a clean non-oily finish, which means it's ready to use and be fitted in all weather.Application: flat roofing, pitched roofs, vertical cladding, hip and ridge flashing, parapet, box and tapered valley gutters, pitched valley gutters, bay tops & canopies, apron & cover flashings, chimney flashings and dormersPlease note: To avoid thermal expansion and contraction issues with lead flashing, individual flashing pieces must not exceed one metre in length. Due to temperature fluctuations, regularly spaced expansion joints must be used.When flashing flat roofs up to a 10 degree pitch, it is important to note that the maximum spacing of joints with the fall must not exceed 600mm, and the maximum distance between the drips must not exceed 2m with Code 5 cast lead.

product.name: Midland Lead Code 8 Cast Lead Roof Flashing
product.description: This roof flashing is manufactured from Code 8 lead, the thickest and most heavy-duty option available, specifically designed for projects that demand maximum performance. With a substantial 3.55mm thickness, it offers outstanding resistance to deformation, thermal movement, and long-term wear. Produced by Midland Lead using 100% recycled raw materials, it is a sustainable choice and fully certified by the British Board of Agrément (BBA).Manufactured through a precision machine-casting process, a rotating water-cooled drum is immersed into molten lead, allowing a dense and uniform sheet to form across its surface. The lead is then smoothly lifted from the drum, wound into coils, and cut into manageable rolls.Features & Benefits: Midland Lead Code 8 Cast Lead Roof Flashing40.3kg/m² nominal weight3.55mm thicknessMachine castBBA Certificate No. 86/1764100% recyclable and sustainableLasts over 100 yearsWhat is Machine Cast Lead?Both cast and milled lead are fabricated according to the same tolerances, codes, analysis and permitted sizes, however, cast lead outperforms milled lead when comparing the strength and creep resistance. Machine Cast Lead has a clean non-oily finish, which means it's ready to use and be fitted in all weather.Application: flat roofing, pitched roofs, parapet, box and tapered valley gutters, bay tops & canopies, and dormersPlease note: To avoid thermal expansion and contraction issues with lead flashing, individual flashing pieces must not exceed one metre in length. Due to temperature fluctuations, regular spaced expansion joints must be used.

Produced by Midland Lead using 100% recycled raw materials, it is a sustainable choice and fully certified by the British Board of Agrément (BBA).Manufactured through a precision machine-casting process, a rotating water-cooled drum is immersed into molten lead, allowing a dense and uniform sheet to form across its surface. The lead is then smoothly lifted from the drum, wound into coils, and cut into manageable rolls.Features & Benefits: Midland Lead Code 8 Cast Lead Roof Flashing40.3kg/m² nominal weight3.55mm thicknessMachine castBBA Certificate No. 86/1764100% recyclable and sustainableLasts over 100 yearsWhat is Machine Cast Lead?Both cast and milled lead are fabricated according to the same tolerances, codes, analysis and permitted sizes, however, cast lead outperforms milled lead when comparing the strength and creep resistance. Machine Cast Lead has a clean non-oily finish, which means it's ready to use and be fitted in all weather.Application: flat roofing, pitched roofs, parapet, box and tapered valley gutters, bay tops & canopies, and dormersPlease note: To avoid thermal expansion and contraction issues with lead flashing, individual flashing pieces must not exceed one metre in length. Due to temperature fluctuations, regular spaced expansion joints must be used.

product.name: Midland Lead Code 6 Cast Lead Roof Flashing
product.description: This roof flashing is produced from Code 6 lead, delivering outstanding strength with excellent flexibility, and is designed to perform for over a century. product.name: Pavestone Discovery Rusty Slate Large Porcelain Paving Slabs - 1200mm x 600mm
product.description: Pavestone Discovery Rusty Slate Large Format Porcelain Paving Slabs measure 1200mm x 600mm x 20mm and feature a dark slate grey base enhanced with natural-looking rust-toned (iron oxide) veining, capturing the distinctive character of traditional rusty slate. product.name: Pavestone Kadapha Black Limestone Paving Slabs

They are available in both single-size packs and mixed-size contractor packs to suit various design needs. Kadapha Black Limestone is a firm favourite amongst many Landscapers and homeowners.When first quarried, black limestone appears as a deep grey shade. However, due to its sensitivity to ultraviolet (UV) light, the natural pigment can fade over time with sun exposure. product.name: Pavestone Priming Slurry Tub 12.5kg
product.description: Pavestone Priming Slurry is specially formulated to ensure strong adhesion for non-porous and low-porous materials such as porcelain and natural stone paving. It is essential for installing porcelain slabs, as it guarantees proper bonding to the bedding layer. It is also highly recommended for natural stone and concrete paving installations.This Pavestone polymer-modified, cement-based slurry primer is engineered to meet the performance standards set by BS7533. Made from a precisely controlled blend of high-quality aggregates, cement, and synthetic polymers, it only requires water to mix. The result is a high-performance priming slurry that enhances bond strength for porcelain tiles, natural stone setts, cobbles, concrete flags, and clay pavers.Features & Benefits: Pavestone Priming Slurry Tub 12.5kgCoverage - Approximately 15m2 per 12.5kg TubEasy to applyRecommended for all porcelain paving installations

product.name: Aqualisa eVolve Black Electric Shower With Adjustable Head
product.description: In stunning Midnight Black, with a contoured, satin silver trim, the streamlined eVolve electric shower has unmistakeable style appeal and all-round quality. Design detail and superb installation flexibility make it the perfect solution for showering on-demand. Retrofitable for most electric shower units, the multi-fit connection options make upgrades and replacements problem free. Alternative power settings and three spray patterns give plenty of showering choices in terms of force and coverage. A separate temperature control smoothly adjusts to the required level, which is digitally displayed and kept safe by the over temperature stop function. Automatic phased shutdown reduces limescale build-up for better performance and product durability.
product.variant_name: Aqualisa eVolve Grey Electric Shower with Adjustable Head - 8.5kW

product.name: Reina Diva Flat Anthracite Heated Towel Rail
product.description: The perfect option for warming your bathrooms and drying your towels, this Diva Flat Heated Towel Rail from Reina is available for purchase in a fantastic range of sizes. With a traditional ladder-style design and a slender profile, you have the space to hang several towels at a time without taking up an unnecessary amount of space.This Diva towel rail is made from steel to ensure durability and strength, and it features a satisfying Anthracite finish. product.name: Mira VIE White Electric Shower
product.description: The Mira Vie White Electric Shower is a cost-effective, modern shower solution featuring left-hand water and cable entry points. Available in a choice of models with different kW ratings, this compact shower is perfect for smaller bathrooms and en-suites and comes in a versatile white finish.The Mira Vie has two pressure-stabilised temperature controls, which are used to control the flow and temperature of the water. There is even an eco setting on the power control dial, which will help you to save on water use. A simple on/off push button at the bottom of the unit allows you to turn your shower on or off without having to adjust your dials, ready for when you next use the shower.Features & Benefits: Mira VIE White Electric ShowerClearscale technology cuts limescale by 50%Comes with a shower rail, hose and colour-matching handsetInlet fitting is a 15mm compression fitting and suitable for pressures between 0.7 and 5.0 barStandards & CertificationBritish Electrotechnical Approvals Board (BEAB: ApprovedCE Marked

product.name: Mira JUMP White Electric Shower
product.description: The Mira Jump White Electric Shower offers versatile installation with up to 36 combinations, making it perfect for replacing existing electric showers in bathrooms, wet rooms, and en-suites. Its sleek, modern design features easy-to-use dials for temperature and power settings, including low, eco, and high options. The eco setting is ideal for energy-saving, while the on/off push button lets you keep your preferred settings. Mira's Clearscale technology reduces limescale build-up by up to 50%, ensuring reliable performance.Complete with an adjustable showerhead offering four spray settings, this shower caters to different preferences, from a gentle spray to a powerful jet. The rub-clean nozzles make cleaning easy and help prevent limescale and mildew build-up. The Mira Jump also includes a height-adjustable slide bar for easy installation over existing holes, a shower hose, and a large showerhead, making it a practical choice for any bathroom.Features & Benefits: Mira JUMP White Electric ShowerDesigned to accept water and cable entry from the left or the right-hand sideInlet fitting is a 15mm compression fittingSuitable for pressures between 1.0 and 5.0 barThe Mira Jump retrofits the following shower brands and modelsAqualisa Quartz and Vitalise S, SL and SLX rangesRedring Xpressions, Plus, Premier & Xpressions Eco-TTriton TZ0Z, T80Z, T75; Rapture and T80Z Fast-FitBristan Smile, Glee, Bliss and JoyStandards & CertificationEnergy Efficiency Class: A
product.variant_name: Mira JUMP White Electric Shower - 10.8kW
